settingsDesc: Manage your club profile, branding, and account configuration.
slugNote: Slug cannot be changed once set. Contact support to update.
contactNote: These details appear on public pages.
logoNote: Upload a logo file (PNG, JPG, SVG, or WebP) or paste a public URL.
customSubdomainDesc: Use your own domain for the player portal.
cnameStep1: Log in to your domain registrar
cnameStep2: Go to DNS settings for your domain
cnameStep3: Add a CNAME record pointing your subdomain to:
dnsPropagation: DNS propagation may take up to 48 hours.

certStatus.emailNote: Sizothumela i-imeyili kubaphathi beklabhu uma i-HTTPS isebenza noma yehluleka — awudingi ukuhlala ubheke leli khasi.
certStatus.lastNotifiedActive: Abaphathi bagcine ukwaziswa: I-HTTPS isebenza ngo-{{when}}
certStatus.lastNotifiedFailed: Abaphathi bagcine ukwaziswa: I-HTTPS yehluleke ngo-{{when}}
certStatus.snoozeEndedBanner: Wawumise lezi zikhumbuzo kuze kube ngu-{{when}} — lesi sikhathi sokumiswa sesiphelile, ngakho-ke sikukhumbuza futhi.

channels.description: These are the messaging channels available for player notifications.

ghin.integrationDesc: Configure your GHIN API credentials for automatic WHS score posting.
ghin.encKeyDesc: The ENCRYPTION_SECRET environment variable is not set.
ghin.encKeyFallback: Server-level credentials are available as a fallback.
ghin.playersWithGhin: {{count}} player has a GHIN number on file.
ghin.playersWithGhin_plural: {{count}} players have a GHIN number on file.

rulesAssistantDesc: Khetha ukuthi imibhalo yaliphi inhlangano elawulayo esetshenziswa Umsizi Wemithetho we-AI, futhi ubhale phansi Imithetho Yendawo yekilabhu yakho ukuze umsizi ayihloniphe lapho ephendula abadlali.
rulesGoverningBodyNote: I-R&A ne-USGA bahlanganyela isethi eyodwa Yemithetho Yegalofu, kodwa basebenzisa imibhalo yokuphatha ehlukile nezinombolo zeMithetho Yendawo Eyisibonelo. Khetha leyo elandelwa yikomidi lakho.
localRulesContentDesc: Bhala phansi Imithetho Yendawo nezimo zomncintiswano zekilabhu yakho. Umsizi Wemithetho uzoyicaphuna lapho ifaneleka. Umbhalo ojwayelekile noma i-Markdown — kuze kufike kuzinhlamvu eziyizi-20,000.
localRulesPlaceholder:
# Imithetho Yendawo

1. Ngaphandle kwemingcele: kuchazwa izigxobo ezimhlophe eduze kwe-fairway yesi-7…
2. Izindawo zenhlawulo: ichibi e-12 liyindawo ebomvu yenhlawulo…
3. Imigwaqo yezimoto: ukukhululeka kwamahhala ngaphansi koMthetho 16.1

walletRefundDigestPaused.warningEdited: Laba bamukeli basohlwini lokuvimba futhi bazoshiywa buthule ekusebenzeni okulandelayo. Engeza ikheli elisebenzayo noma ukhuphule ukuvimba ngezansi.
walletRefundDigestPaused.warningSaved: Laba bamukeli basohlwini lokuvimba futhi bazoshiywa buthule ekusebenzeni okulandelayo.
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastDescription: Ikheli {{count}} lisohlwini lokuvimba lokubuyiswa / lokukhansela futhi lizoshiywa buthule ekusebenzeni okulandelayo. Bheka izexwayiso ezingezansi.
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastDescription_other: Amakheli {{count}} asohlwini lokuvimba lokubuyiswa / lokukhansela futhi azoshiywa buthule ekusebenzeni okulandelayo. Bheka izexwayiso ezingezansi.
walletRefundDigestPaused.unsuppressToastRestored: {{email}} angathola izifinyezo futhi futhi wabuyiselwa ohlwini lwabamukeli.

levyLedgerDigestPaused.chipTitle: Omunye noma abamukeli abathe basohlwini lokuvimba lokubuyiselwa / lokukhansela futhi bazokwephulwa
levyLedgerDigestPaused.panelHeader: Kumisiwe muva nje — la makheli azoshiywa buthule ekusebenzeni okulandelayo
levyLedgerDigestPaused.removeButtonTitle: Susa ohlwini lokuvimba ukuze leli kheli likwazi ukuthola izifinyezo zebhuku futhi
levyLedgerDigestPaused.fromRunHistoryTitle: Ukuvimba sekuvele kuphakanyiswa; ikheli lizothola isifinyezo esilandelayo uma ulibuyisela ohlwini lwabamukeli.

levyLedgerDigestPaused.saveToastDescription_other: Amakheli {{count}} asohlwini lokuvimba lokubuyiswa / lokukhansela futhi azoshiywa buthule ekusebenzeni okulandelayo. Bheka izexwayiso ezingezansi.

walletTopupRefunds.title: Ukugcwaliswa kwesikhwama okubuyiselwe ngokuzenzakalelayo
walletTopupRefunds.intro: Konke ukugcwaliswa kwesikhwama okubuyiselwe ngokuzenzakalelayo umsebenzi wokuhlanganisa — kuwusizo lapho ilungu litshela uMnyango Wezezimali ukuthi ikhadi labo lakhokhiswa kodwa isikhwama sabo asikaze sifakwe imali.
walletTopupRefunds.invalidRangeDescription: Usuku “lokusukela” kufanele lube ngosuku noma ngaphambi kosuku “lokugcina”.
walletTopupRefunds.refundsEmpty: Akukho ukugcwaliswa kwesikhwama okubuyiselwe ngokuzenzakalelayo kwalesi sihlungi.

walletRefundDigestSchedule.title: Thumela lokhu okufingqiwe Kwezezimali ngohlelo
walletRefundDigestSchedule.description: Thumela ngokuzenzakalelayo i-CSV yokugcwaliswa kwesikhwama okubuyisiwe njalo ngeviki noma ngenyanga ukuze ukuhlanganiswa kwenzeke ngokugcwele kuyibhokisi lokungenayo — ngaphandle kokukhumbula ukungena.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.saveToastEnabled: Ezezimali zizothola i-CSV elandelayo yokubuyisa ngokuzenzakalelayo.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.removeConfirm: Susa uhlelo lwe-imeyili lokubuyisa ngokuzenzakalelayo kwesikhwama?
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitSeconds_one: Sicela ulinde {{count}} isekhondi ngaphambi kokuthumela esinye isibukeli sokuqala.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitSeconds_other: Sicela ulinde {{count}} amasekhondi ngaphambi kokuthumela esinye isibukeli sokuqala.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitGeneric: Sicela ulinde isikhashana ngaphambi kokuthumela esinye isibukeli sokuqala.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitSeconds_one: Sicela ulinde {{count}} isekhondi ngaphambi kokuthumela enye ifingqo.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitSeconds_other: Sicela ulinde {{count}} amasekhondi ngaphambi kokuthumela enye ifingqo.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitGeneric: Sicela ulinde isikhashana ngaphambi kokuthumela enye ifingqo.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowSentDescription_one: Kulethwe {{rowCount}} umugqa wokubuyisa ku-{{currencyCount}} imali kuya ku-{{recipientCount}} umamukeli.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowSentDescription_other: Kulethwe {{rowCount}} imigqa yokubuyisa ku-{{currencyCount}} izimali kuya ku-{{recipientCount}} abamukeli.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageBanner: Abamukeli bazothola lokhu okufingqiwe ngolimi abalukhethayo. Abamukeli bangaphandle bayabuyela ku-<lang>{{language}}</lang> — ulimi olumisiwe ngokuzenzakalelayo lwenhlangano yakho.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageFallbackWarning: Ulimi olulondoloziwe lwenhlangano yakho (“{{configured}}”) alukahunyushwa kulokhu okufingqiwe, ngakho ulimi lokubuyela kubamukeli bangaphandle isiNgisi.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageFallbackWarningNoConfig: Ulimi olulondoloziwe lwenhlangano yakho alukahunyushwa kulokhu okufingqiwe, ngakho ulimi lokubuyela kubamukeli bangaphandle isiNgisi.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languagePreviewHint: Sebenzisa “Thumela isibukeli sokuqala” ukuthola ikhophi nganoma yiluphi ulimi olusekelwayo kuyibhokisi lakho lokungenayo ngaphambi kokuba abagcini bemali bayibone.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.recipientPreferenceMismatchTooltip: Okuthandwa ulimi okugciniwe kwalo mamukeli yi-{{preferred}}, kodwa akukahunyushwa kulokhu okufingqiwe, ngakho uzothola i-{{resolved}} esikhundleni salokho.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewLanguageTitle: Ulimi okuzobonisa ngalo isibukeli sokuqala. Lokhu kuthi kuthinta lesi sibukeli sokuqala kuphela — akushintshi uhlelo noma ulimi olumisiwe lwenhlangano yakho.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendPreviewButtonTitle: Thumela kuyibhokisi lakho ikhophi yomamukeli oyedwa walokhu okufingqiwe, ngolimi olukhethiwe.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewDialogDescription: Yilokhu i-imeyili ehlelekile elandelayo ebizobukeka uma ithunyelwa khona manje. Akukho okuthunyelwe futhi akukho ukusebenza okurekhodiwe.

marketingSiteRefresh.notRefreshedYet: Akukavuselelwa — umsebenzi wokuvuselela wesikhathi esithile uzokulanda futhi phakathi kwesonto.
marketingSiteRefresh.refreshFailed: Ayikwazanga ukuvuselela ku-{{host}} — {{error}}. Ikhophi elondoloziwe isasetshenziswa — namathisela i-URL entsha ngenhla ukuze uzame futhi.
marketingSiteRefresh.refreshFailedWithDate: Ayikwazanga ukuvuselela ku-{{host}} — {{error}} ngo-{{when}}. Ikhophi elondoloziwe isasetshenziswa — namathisela i-URL entsha ngenhla ukuze uzame futhi.
